findings.claim: The root package.json adds a resolutions entry that remaps the package name 'GendocuPublicApis' to an npm package 'gendocu-public-apis', an unusual dependency substitution with no apparent connection to the rest of the resolutions block (which otherwise contains patch overrides for existing packages), and no decision record explains why this resolution exists.
findings.consequence: A maintainer investigating the dependency tree six months from now would find an unexplained resolution mapping to a package name that does not appear anywhere else in the manifest, and would not know whether this is an intentional supply-chain redirect, a leftover from a compromised or malicious package substitution, or a typo-squat mitigation, without a recorded rationale.
